details.note: This compares Pi harness empirical outcomes to explicit Claude Code-style expectations and includes a self-capability comparison between generic coding and cyber-remediation workloads. It does not invoke live Claude Code product calls.

scorecard.expectation: Loads repo instructions and keeps durable task planning state
Uses tools for repository search, scoped edits, and shell validation

Runs first-class headless CLI workloads with live GLM 5.2
Defends cyber workloads with DLP, IPI delimiting, approvals, signed attestations, Secrets Manager handling, AWS boundaries, and CAS route policy
Exports empirical traces and feature coverage with remaining gaps documented
Remediates representative vulnerabilities, not only generic coding bugs
Compares Pi harness generic coding evidence against stricter cyber-remediation evidence without external product calls
